agent.command.new: 🔄 New conversation started. How can I help you?
agent.command.help:
Available commands:
/new - restart conversation
/help - view commands
/status - view session state
agent.command.unknown: ⚠️ Unknown command. Use /help to view available commands.
agent.pending.cancelled: Perfect, I canceled the pending action.
agent.error.pipeline:
An error occurred in the cognitive pipeline:
{message}
agent.error.delivery: ❌ Error sending response. Check system logs.
agent.session.not_found: I could not find an active session to register installation authorization.
agent.install.browser.success: Browser support installation completed successfully. I can now validate HTML projects automatically in this session.
agent.install.browser.failed:
I received your authorization and tried to install browser support automatically, but installation did not complete successfully in this environment.

You can still:
1. install puppeteer manually
2. continue in degraded mode without browser validation
agent.project.connected: Existing project connected to this session: {projectId}. I will continue editing this project without creating a new one.
agent.project.ask_action: What do you want to do with this project?
index.skills.none: No installed skills right now. Note: native tools are listed by the list_available_tools tool.
index.tools.none: No tools available in the registry.
index.skill.temp_not_found: Error: skill "{name}" not found in skills/temp/.
index.skill.audit_missing: Error: missing audit for "{name}". Run run_skill_auditor before finalizing.
index.skill.audit_not_found: Error: no audit result found for "{name}".
error.executor.repair_plan_missing: LLM did not return a repair plan.
error.executor.tool_input_correction_mis: LLM did not return a tool_input correction.
error.parse_llm_json.recovery_failed:
Failed to parse LLM JSON after recovery attempts:
{preview}
error.plan.hallucinated_tool: Validation failed: hallucinated tool detected in plan -> {tool}
error.plan.recreate_active_project: Validation failed: do not recreate project when an active project already exists in session.
error.plan.workspace_requires_create_fir: Validation failed: plan must start with workspace_create_project when there is no active project.
error.planner.plan_not_generated: Planner could not produce a usable plan.
error.repair.bootstrap_failed: Repair pipeline could not create workspace bootstrap.
index.skill.install_aborted: Installation aborted for "{name}": audit status {status}. Staging removed.
index.skill.warning_requires_allow: Audit for "{name}" returned WARNING. To proceed, run finalize_public_skill_install with allow_warning=true.
index.skill.install_success: Skill {name} installed successfully in skills/public/{name} and indexed in cognitive memory.
index.skill.promoted_not_active: Skill {name} promoted to skills/public/{name}, but it is not active yet (check audit/log).
index.skill.uninstalled: Skill {name} removed completely from the system. Orphans cleaned: {count}.
loop.empty_sanitized_answer: I processed your request and can continue with the next step.
loop.fallback.default_answer: Sorry, I could not complete the task. Try rephrasing your request.
loop.reality_check_suffix: Note: I did not execute these commands here. If you want, I can share the steps to run locally.
loop.system.max_iterations: You reached the iteration limit. DO NOT use tools. Respond objectively and directly to the user (max 3 lines) with the result or next steps.
loop.system.multiple_tool_failures: You have already failed multiple times trying to use tools. Stop trying tools and respond directly to the user with a useful explanation of how to do the task.
loop.system.repeated_tool: You are repeating the same tool "{tool}" multiple times. Stop using tools and answer the user directly.
provider.dummy.echo: I am IalClaw. I received your message: {content}
provider.dummy.help: How can I help you using my local cognitive system?
provider.error.model_not_found.user: Model {model} was not found in the configured Ollama. Adjust OLLAMA_MODEL/MODEL or pull the model first.
provider.error.timeout.user: Ollama took too long to respond during {operation}. Check machine load, model {model} availability, and host latency {host}.
provider.error.unauthorized.user: Ollama provider rejected authentication. Check OLLAMA_API_KEY and endpoint permissions.
provider.error.unknown.user: An unexpected communication error occurred with Ollama. Check structured logs for details.
provider.error.unreachable.log: Network failure calling Ollama ({operation}). Check connectivity to {host}.
provider.error.unreachable.user: IalClaw could not reach Ollama at {host}. Check that service is running and model {model} is available.
runtime.direct_no_answer: Direct execution finished with no textual response.
runtime.missing_capability: Current environment does not provide required capability: {capability}.
runtime.plan_missing: Execution failed: no planning strategy produced a usable plan.
runtime.puppeteer_missing:
Project was generated, but an environment component is missing for automatic HTML testing: puppeteer.

You can proceed in two ways:
1. install it manually
2. authorize the agent to try installing it for you

If you want, reply:
"you can install puppeteer"
and I will try to do it for you.
runtime.react_legacy: Legacy ReAct flow triggered (add AgentLoop logic here if needed).
runtime.replan_instruction: Replan in conservative mode. Prefer at most 3 steps. Return only what is essential to unblock execution.
runtime.session_not_found: Active session not found to execute plan.
runtime.success.slides.open_html: Open the HTML file in output to view the presentation.
runtime.success.slides.title: Slides generated successfully.
runtime.success.title: Execution completed successfully.
telegram.input.document_received_reply: Document received. IalClaw will index it in semantic memory soon.
telegram.input.process_voice_placeholder: Process please user voice message (transcription placeholder)
telegram.output.attachment_notice: Generated file attached in this conversation: {filename}
tool.run.puppeteer_not_installed: Puppeteer is not installed. Install it to execute HTML projects.
telegram.output.error.catastrophic_save_: [IALCLAW] Catastrophic failure: could not save response to file.
cli.start.already_running_hint: Use ialclaw restart to restart or ialclaw stop to stop.
cli.help.title: Available commands:
cli.help.start_debug: ialclaw start --debug         Starts with verbose logs
cli.help.start_debug_tail: ialclaw start --debug --tail  Debug + live log tail
cli.help.logs: ialclaw logs                  Shows recent log lines
cli.help.logs_follow: ialclaw logs --follow         Follows logs in real time
cli.help.lang_set: ialclaw lang pt-BR            Persists language in config.json
cli.help.lang_flag: --lang=pt-BR                  Overrides language for the current command only
script.bootstrap.identities.ready: [Bootstrap] Gateway identities ready. Inserted: {inserted}, updated: {updated}, total agents: {total}.

What content do you want to use?

You can:

• Provide a file path
• Describe the content you want

hybrid.suggest_tool: Would you like me to use the **{tool}** tool to get more detailed data?

onboarding.welcome:
👋 Hi! Let's get to know you better to personalize your experience:

1️⃣ *How would you like to be called?*
onboarding.familiarity:
2️⃣ *What is your level of familiarity with AI/CLI tools?*

1 - *Beginner* - I prefer detailed explanations
2 - *Intermediate* - I already use similar tools
3 - *Advanced* - I want full control and shortcuts
onboarding.prazer:
3️⃣ *What do you work or study?*

Ex: Developer, Researcher, Law Student, Designer... (optional)
onboarding.objetivos:
4️⃣ *What are your main goals when using IalClaw?* (Choose one or more)

1️⃣ 🧑‍💻 Code development and automation
2️⃣ 📚 Research and knowledge organization
3️⃣ 📝 Content creation and writing
4️⃣ 🗂️ Task management and productivity
5️⃣ 🔍 Search and information analysis
6️⃣ 🎓 Learning and tutoring
7️⃣ Other (type your option)
onboarding.estilo_resposta:
5️⃣ *What response style do you prefer?*

⚡ *Concise* - Direct answers to the point
📖 *Detailed* - Complete explanations with context
🎯 *Adaptive* - Agent decides based on complexity
onboarding.autonomia:
6️⃣ *What level of autonomy do you allow the agent?*

🔒 *Conservative* - Always ask before executing actions
⚖️ *Balanced* - Autonomy for routine tasks
🚀 *Confident* - Execute when having high confidence
onboarding.workspace:
7️⃣ *Where would you like IalClaw to manage your projects?* (Workspace)

Type the path or press Enter for default:
`~/ialclaw/workspace`
onboarding.integrations:
8️⃣ *Do you use any tools you would like to integrate?*

1 - GitHub/GitLab
2 - VS Code / IDEs
3 - Google Drive / OneDrive
4 - External APIs
5 - None for now
onboarding.language:
9️⃣ *Language preference for responses (besides interface):*

1 - Keep system default (en-US)
2 - Prefer English for technical terms
3 - Always in the language of my question
onboarding.suggestion.default: Type /skills to see what I can do or ask for help!
onboarding.suggestion.code: Want me to help with some code in your Workspace?
onboarding.suggestion.research: Want me to research something new today?
